heading: Agreements and records
label: 6572 Agreements and records

Amendments2015—Subsec. (a). , amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “All published proposed regulations shall conform to agreements that result from negotiated rulemaking described in unless the Secretary reopens the negotiated rulemaking process or provides a written explanation to the participants involved in the process explaining why the Secretary decided to depart from, and not adhere to, such agreements.”Pub. children.heading: Agreements
children.label: a Agreements
children.text: In any case in which a negotiated rulemaking process is established under , all published proposed regulations shall conform to agreements that result from the rulemaking described in unless the Secretary reopens the negotiated rulemaking process.section 6571(b) of this titlesection 6571 of this title

children.heading: Records
children.label: b Records
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that an accurate and reliable record of agreements reached during the negotiations process is maintained.
